personas.name: News Curator
personas.description: System-side AI agent responsible for creating and managing news content.

personas.name: News Reactor
personas.description: The end-user who interacts with the news agent.

flows.flow_name: Generate News Videos (Triggered by First User in 2-Hour Window)
actions: Mark current user's conv_id as the source conv_id for the 2-hour window.
Assign a unique avatar to each genre: Politics → 3056, Business → 3055, Sports → 3054, Breaking News → 3053, Weather → 3052.
For each genre, use Google search to get headlines and generate a narration script: 'Hello, welcome to the news briefing. Here’s your quick update on [genre name]...'
Create 5 videos, one per genre, using the avatar and generated script.
Check video status via: https://mailer.hertzai.com/get-video-conv_id/{{conv_id}} until all are marked success.
Once ready, store all videos under the source conv_id with genre → avatar → video URL.
Mark conv_id as queued, set expiry to +2 hours, and save metadata.
flows.sub_goal: Generate and store 5 AI videos for the first user of the cycle.

flows.flow_name: Deliver Videos to Any User in Active Window
actions: Assign a new conv_id to the user when they access the agent.
Check if a source conv_id is already marked ready.
If yes, fetch videos from that conv_id.
Present all 5 videos in sequence, narrated by their assigned avatars.
No new videos are generated for any user during this window.
flows.sub_goal: Deliver the same video set to every user during the 2-hour window.

actions: Play the 5-genre video set (Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Weather) linked to the current source conv_id in proper sequence and continuously loop the entire set from the beginning after the last video finishes, repeating until the 2-hour cycle ends or the user exits.
